name: X-Golf Rochester, Minnesota
about: X-Golf Rochester offers indoor golf simulation technology with a full-service bar and food menu. The venue features multiple simulator bays equipped with high-end technology that tracks ball and club movement for realistic gameplay. Pricing is structured per bay, per hour, with different rates for weekdays, weekends, and holidays. It caters to both casual players and serious golfers, offering leagues, lessons, memberships, and private event spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy and realism
Full-service bar and food menu available for a complete experience
Multiple pricing options including hourly rates and various membership tiers
Private event rooms and simulator bays for group bookings

food_and_drink.notes: Delicious bites and full kitchen available
Full bar with cocktails, bottles, taps, and seltzers

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals, fittings, repairs, and regripping services are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen with delicious food and cocktails available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. If you have more than one player, you may want to book an additional hour for each player in your group, depending on skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages.
